strengths: Solid background in distributed systems and high-throughput microservices, including experience handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure, Model Context Protocol (MCP) generators, and supporting agentic workflows.
Demonstrated architectural ownership and entrepreneurial drive as the founder and lead developer of an event-driven geo-data platform.
concerns: Lacks the required executive-level leadership experience, having primarily held individual contributor (Senior/Staff) roles rather than CTO or VP-level positions.
No demonstrated track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, managing external delivery partners, or reporting to a board.
Agentic AI experience is very recent and tooling-focused, missing the mandatory history of operating multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes, regulated financial environments.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff-level software craftsman with a strong foundation in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling. However, he falls significantly short of the executive requirements for this CTO role. He lacks the mandatory 5+ years of senior technical leadership, experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ members, and a proven track record of deploying complex multi-agent AI systems for algorithmic trading or credit risk in regulated financial environments.
